<?php declare(strict_types=1); /* * This file is part of the league/config package. * * (c) Colin O'Dell <colinodell@gmail.com> * * For the full copyright and license information, please view the LICENSE * file that was distributed with this source code. */ namespace League\Config; /** * Implement this class to facilitate setter injection of the configuration where needed */ interface ConfigurationAwareInterface { public function setConfiguration(ConfigurationInterface $configuration): void; }
